_meta.note: Apple-side data is auto-harvested from each SDK's own shipped PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy (see tools/kb-build.mjs; per-entry `source` and `lastVerified` say when). Play-side data is curated and MUST be verified against the Google Play SDK Index. Data collection varies by SDK version and by how the app configures the SDK.

entries.name: Firebase Analytics
entries.source: SEED example; verify against FirebaseAnalytics PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy + Play SDK Index
